name: bitget-guardpilot-workspace
description: Root workspace launcher for the GuardPilot Bitget hackathon project.

scripts.dev:api: PYTHON=${PYTHON:-$PWD/.venv/bin/python}; [ -x "$PYTHON" ] || PYTHON=python3; cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api "$PYTHON" -m uvicorn guardpilot.main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --port 8000
scripts.replay: PYTHON=${PYTHON:-$PWD/.venv/bin/python}; [ -x "$PYTHON" ] || PYTHON=python3; cd guardpilot && "$PYTHON" scripts/replay.py --scenario samples/scenarios/btc_momentum_crash.json
scripts.bitget:trace: PYTHON=${PYTHON:-$PWD/.venv/bin/python}; [ -x "$PYTHON" ] || PYTHON=python3; cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api "$PYTHON" scripts/bitget_official_agent_trace.py
scripts.fetch:market: PYTHON=${PYTHON:-$PWD/.venv/bin/python}; [ -x "$PYTHON" ] || PYTHON=python3; cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api "$PYTHON" scripts/fetch_bitget_snapshot.py
scripts.test: PYTHON=${PYTHON:-$PWD/.venv/bin/python}; [ -x "$PYTHON" ] || PYTHON=python3; cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api "$PYTHON" -m pytest apps/api/guardpilot/tests
